creator: junovitch@freebsd.org
text:
QA looks good, thank you Pavel! Pending mentor approval for commit.

Poudriere: I checked that the updates builds on all releases.
9.3-RELEASE-p24     amd64
9.3-RELEASE-p24     i386
10.1-RELEASE-p19    amd64
10.1-RELEASE-p19    i386
10.2-RELEASE-p2     amd64
10.2-RELEASE-p2     i386
11.0-CURRENTr286886 amd64
11.0-CURRENTr286888 i386

Portlint: 4 warnings that are all false positives.

Runtime: Basic usage is fine.
